button.description: Action Radius. Mapped from radii.sm (8px). Ensures consistent corner treatment for all interactive action components.

input.description: Form Radius. Mapped from radii.sm (8px). Aligns input fields and text areas with button styling for a cohesive form UI.

card.description: Container Radius. Mapped from radii.lg (20px). Applied to standard content cards and informational sections.

dropdown.description: Menu Radius. Mapped from radii.md (12px). Used for floating menus; sharper than cards but softer than buttons.

modal.description: Overlay Radius. Mapped from radii.xl (24px). Provides a softer, more encapsulated feel for large-scale modal windows.

none.description: Hard Edge. Zero radius. Used for full-bleed containers or specific sharp-edged design requirements.

full.description: Maximum Radius. Mapped to 9999px. Used for pill-shaped buttons, circular avatars, or progress bar ends.

purpose: Semantic radius tokens for specific component sizes (button.radius.sm/md/lg, card, input, dropdown). Aliases into Global's radius primitives.
